ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the inventory item */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the inventory item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the item in stock */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the inventory item */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the inventory item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the inventory item */,
  "date_valid" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory data was last validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person's name for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sale occurred */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale took place */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (online, in-store, etc.) */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale transaction */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the sale transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (retail, warehouse, etc.) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the store */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse associated with the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item moved */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store involved in the movement */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse involved in the movement */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the movement occurred */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (transfer, receipt, etc.) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item moved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES stores ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demand_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand forecast */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the forecast was made */,
  "demand_quantity" INTEGER /* Forecasted demand quantity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demand_forecasts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the evaluation was made */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Performance rating (0-1) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the supplier's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
